set.body: Three scripts: benchmark-dense-products.R, benchmark-mlx-products.R, benchmark-chained-dense.R. Ops: matmul, crossprod, tcrossprod, chained_products (flagship multi-op). Hard library(amatrix.mlx) must be guarded. Priming must happen outside timer (blocked by P1 amatrix-fjo for the shared prime_backend helper). matmul and crossprod are already baselined <e2><80><94> dedupe with existing benchmark-regression.R rows. chained-dense needs a new op name (chained_ab_c or similar) and new baseline rows.
set.title: Rehabilitate dense-product benchmarks (dense-products, mlx-products, chained-dense)
